titleStmt.title: SII 24.91: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 91. (A.R. No. 125 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of lands, by purchase for 200 drammas by Ādittaṉ Tiruvaraṅgadēvaṉ alias Virudarājabhayaṅkara Vijaiyapālaṉ towards offerings and a jewel Śrīpādasālam (Śrīpādasaram) to the god on specified occasions. One of the lands, which was once endowed for the jewel mentioned above by Vaḷavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ was now to be reclaimed and its produce to be utilised for the same purpose. The record is dated in the 41st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavu n=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayil nuṉaik kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai
cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyu n=tanimaiyun=taviravantu punitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭiyiraṇṭun=taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manu vāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇ kuṭai tirunilaviḷākam Eṅ
kaṇun=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutan=ta katañcorikaḷiṟumuṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai (paruntalai) paruntalaittiṭat tan ponnakaṟ puṟat tiṭaik kiṭappa pinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu
tan kai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇa lūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramuṅkiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talai virittalamarak kuṭa ticait tannāṭukantu tānun tāṉaiyum pan
nāḷiṭṭap palapalamutukum payantetir māṟina jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiñcel vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭa
laṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum poru parittalaṅ kaḷum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraiyvarum porutamaṟ kaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttum carar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟ
ṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastampan ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭ potiyiṟum mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccaiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tani vicum peṟa māveriya tan varutanit talaivaraik kurukalar kulai koṭṭāru toṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi poṅ
(poṅ)koḷiyāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pār toḻac civaniṭattumaiyena tinacintāmaṇi Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruntena maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicai vallapi Eḻulaka (mulaka)muṭaiyāḷ vāḻi malarntini tiruppa Ūḻiyum Avanimuḻutuṭai yāḷoṭum vi marāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1Āvatu pāṇṭikulācanivaḷa nāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār kanmikaḷom śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa pārttiventirap brahmādhirājar Evaṟpaṭi śrīvaiṣṇavavāriyam Arumārit tirukkaḻakaṇṭarum Iṭavai nārāyaṇa nampiyum parakesarit tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyum tiru viṇṇakar nampiyum śiripāta- dāsarum
periyakoyiṟ piriyarum perumpuliyūr tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyānampiyum tiruveṅ kaṭappiccarum tiruccaṅkaṇi tuṟaivaṉu tiruvaraṅkappiccarum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap piriyarum nālūrt tirunāṭu(ṭu)ṭaiyānampiyum Āritanārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutu Āritan kecavan taniyiḷañciṅkamum Āritan tiru ṟi vāriyānum kāśyapan ciṅ
kan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum koyiṟ kaṇakku Araiya nampalak kūttanāna nānūṟṟuvapiriyanum śrīvaiṣṇavakkaṇakku Ārāvamutu villiyāna śrīvaiyiṣṇavap piriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻ kaḷom Irāja suntarivaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭuk kaṭuvaṅkuṭi kaṭuvaṅkuṭaiyān Ātittan tiruvaraṅkatevanāna virutarāja viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu
Irājamahendravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūrnāṭṭu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟa ṭantu maṇaliṭāy payirceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭanta Uṭaiyār Āḻvān viḻupparaiyar Āḻvārkku kastūri cāttiyaruḷukaikke putu viḷākamākka nilaṅkoṇṭu tiruttik kalveṭṭukaikku śrīvaiṣṇavan ṭaiya rāy(ya) vantārum ko
ṭu vantu tiruvaraṅkattu Aṭaippu mutalil Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikan pakkal til nila vilaikku kā kkut tiramum Irupatti Eṭṭum pūccukku pari caṭṭattukku tiramam 4- nālum Ākat tiramam 32Engraved above the line.muppattiraṇṭu Ittiramam nūṟṟeṇpatteṭṭu miṭṭu Ivviḷākattil Ippu ttin kuḻi Aññūṟṟiṉāl nila
m kāl nikki maṇaliṭāyum kuṭṭamāyum tiṭalāyum kiṭanta nilam munṟemu velikkum Ippu ntiruttina nilaṅ kāl varicaikku śrīpaṇṭārat nāl Aḷakkakkaṭava nel muppattiru kalattināl Ūrkkālākki ne kum pokam potāmaiyi
l Ivvaḷavaṉ viḻupparaiyan varukaiyilum In nilaṅkoṇṭa nilam nāṟpattoṉṟāvatu varaiyiluñ cella Inta nilaṅ kallā kiṭantamaiyālum
kastūri cāttiyaruḷa koṇṭu kastūri cāttivarukaiyālum Innilam kaṭuvaṅkuṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkatevanārāna virutarāja payaṅkara vijaiyapālarku tināḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ puṟampe Eḻuntaruḷi Ekātaci tirumañcaṉam pukkaruḷi mukkalavariciyāl peruntiruvamutu ce
ytaruḷi tiruvaraṅkateva Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu tūṇiyariciyil Appam Amutu ceytaruḷukaikkum tiruvaraṅkatevane viḷākamākak kaikkoṇṭu tiruttina tiruttātu pāḻ kiṭan=ta nilam munṟemukkālum Āka nilam nālu veliyum kaikkoṇṭu tiruvaraṅkattaṭai
-tavi puṇṭarikanum kalveṭṭavum nilantiruttavum paṉaiyūruṭaiyār vaḷavan viḻupparaiyan kuṭutta tiramam Irunūṟṟirupatukkum vilaimāṟu periyakoyilil śrīvayiṣṇavaril parakesari muṭaiyānampiyum tiruviṇṇakar nampiyum śrībharatadāsarum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷappiriyarum kan tāṭait tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa nampi
yum śrīpuṇṭarikanum Uḷḷiṭṭār vacam nāṟpattoṉṟāvatu Āni maāsattu nāḷ munnūṟṟaimpattiraṇṭu peṟṟa cevvākkiḻamaiyum Urokaṇiyum Ivvirutarājapayaṅkara vijaiyapāla Innilattukku Ā vilaikku Innilantiruttina tiramattukku talaimāṟum Oṭukkina tiramam Iru nūṟṟirupatum Ittiramam Iru
nūṟṟirupatum Oṭukki paṉaiyūruṭaiyān vaḷavan viḻupparaiyar perāl Aḻakiyamaṇa vāḷapperumāḷ tiruvaṭi malaṟku śrīpātacālam ceytu cāttukaikku pon koḷḷa tiramam Irunūṟṟirupatum koṇṭu Innilam nālveliyum It tiruppaṇikku Uṭalāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai kāraik kuṭikkiḻai yellai ta
tiṭalāna nārāyaṇaviḷākattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai maṇaṟkuṭi nilattukkum kāraikkuṭit tiṟappu nilattukku vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai kūṭa lūr nilattukkum peruvākkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kku lakku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam periya tiruka napurattuk kiḻai kolāl
kuḻikoṇṭatu Oru māvāka nilam nālveliyum tiruttaṟat tirutti veli Onṟukku puncey varicaikku paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl śrīpaṇṭā ratte Aḷakku nel Eṇkalamāka nilam nāl velikkum Aḷakku nel muppattirukalamum Aḷantu Innilattil mikutikoṇṭu tirumañcanattukkum peruntiruvamutukkum Appavamutukkum Uṭalākakkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatā
kak koyilil kal veṭṭuvittukkoḷḷappeṟuvārākavum Innilattukkum ku rampu cennirveṭṭi tirunāḷ kuṭimai maṟṟum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai Ep perppaṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavarallātārākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu Innilam nāl veliyum Ikkaṭuvaṅkuṭaiyār Āticcan tiruvaraṅkatevanārāna viruta rājapayaṅkara vijaiyapālaṟku Ittiramam Irunūṟṟirupatum tiruvāparaṇat tukku Uṭa
lākak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ittiruvaraṅkateva viḷākam nāl veli yum cantirātittaval niṟka Ivvirutarājapayaṅkara vijaiyapālaṟku viṟṟukkuṭut tom Ivvāḻvār kanmikaḷom Āḻvār koyiṟkaṇakku Araiyanampalak kūttanāna nānūṟṟuvappiriyannen Ivai yenneḻuttu śrī vaiyiṣṇavarkaḷukku Ārāvamutu villiyāna śrī vaiyiṣṇa
vappiriya nneḻuttu Ippaṭikku kantāṭai tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanampi yen Ippaṭi tiruvaraṅkamāḷiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku nārāyaṇanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan puṇṭarikanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruviṇṇa tiruvaraṅka piccanneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
parakecariccerit tirunāṭuṭai samñeyānamaikku śrīkārimāṟa neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvara periya koyil piriya neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan taniyiḷañciṅkan Ippaṭikku Ivai perumpuliyūrt tiruvākkulamuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku namaikku Ivai navamāteviaṉci neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan cirākava
periyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tācaratittirikūṭadāsaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Oli konṟai śrīvayiṣṇavappiriya neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nālūrt tirunāṭuṭaiyānampi yeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ḻakiya maṇavāḷakkoneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruccākarat tuṟai va
Ippaṭikku patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrī vaiyi ṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
